Nexus Labs

Dear [Hiring Manager Name or Hiring Team],

I am writing to express my enthusiasm for the Software Engineering Intern position at Nexus Labs. As a recent Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in developing web applications and APIs, I am eager to contribute to your team and learn from industry professionals.

During my time as an Undergraduate Research Assistant, I developed a REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, as well as a full-stack web application with Flask and React. This experience honed my skills in writing clean, tested code, collaborating on projects, and participating in design discussions—key requirements for this role at Nexus Labs.

I am passionate about contributing to product features that enhance user experience and streamline processes. I would be thrilled to bring my foundational knowledge of software development, eagerness to learn, and teamwork skills to Nexus Labs.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Sincerely,
[Your Full Name]
outputs.coverLetterDetailed:
[Your Full Name]
[Your Street Address]
[City, State, Zip Code]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]

[Date]

[Hiring Manager Name]
[Recipient Job Title]
Nexus Labs
[City, State]

Dear [Hiring Manager Name or Hiring Team],

I am excited to apply for the Software Engineering Intern position at Nexus Labs. Graduating with a Bachelor of Arts in Computer Science from Southwestern University, I have gained substantial experience in software development and a solid foundation in programming languages relevant to the role.

In my current role as an Undergraduate Research Assistant at Texas A&M University, I developed a REST API with FastAPI and PostgreSQL to manage data from learning management systems. This was complemented by a full-stack project utilizing Flask and React, where I designed a web application that analyzed GitHub collaboration data. My experience in this environment required me to write clean, maintainable code and engage in code reviews, aligning perfectly with the collaborative culture at Nexus Labs.

In addition, my time as an Information Technology Support Specialist at Southwestern University has sharpened my problem-solving skills. I frequently troubleshooted complex issues with computers and classroom equipment, enhancing my understanding of diverse technical challenges. This role has prepared me to debug issues efficiently and refine developer tooling, areas of responsibility listed in the job description.

I am particularly drawn to Nexus Labs because of your commitment to innovation and teamwork. I am eager to learn from your experienced engineers and contribute to the development of impactful product features. My eagerness to grow and collaborate makes me a perfect fit for your team.

Thank you for taking the time to consider my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing my candidacy further.

Sincerely,
[Your Full Name]

outputs.linkedinMessage: Hi [Recruiter Name], I'm Jake Ryan, and I've applied for the Software Engineering Intern position at Nexus Labs. I'd love to connect and learn more about the team and any insights you might have about the role. Thanks!
outputs.atsVersion: Seeking a Software Engineering Intern position at Nexus Labs, I am a Computer Science graduate with experience in Python, Flask, React, REST API, and PostgreSQL. I'm skilled in using Git for version control, collaborating on projects, and eager to learn from a team of experienced engineers.
